northstar: Gmail Inbox Triage — find cheapest CLI+model combo for email classification
context: ABCD test using REAL CLI webservices (POST /api/cli-agents/generate). Tests same email triage prompt against 4 different CLI backends. Each CLI wraps a different LLM provider. Finds the cheapest model that meets quality threshold for email classification.

abcd_config.description: Classify 3 sample emails into priority categories using uplift-enriched prompt (35+ P-skills active)
abcd_config.test_prompt:
You are an email triage assistant for Phuc Truong, CEO of Solace AGI. Classify each email as CRITICAL, HIGH, MEDIUM, LOW, or ARCHIVE. Reply with ONLY a JSON array.

Emails:
1. From: tyson@phuc.net, Subject: 'hey dad pick me up at 4'
2. From: notifications@github.com, Subject: '[solace-browser] New issue #42'
3. From: partner@sequoiacap.com, Subject: 'Follow up on Series A'

Classify each (JSON array with email_index, classification, confidence 1-10, reason):

expected_outcome: Winner = Model A (Gemini Flash at $0.15/1M) or Model B (Haiku at $0.25/1M) for simple classification. Proves ABCD 'best deal' routing with real CLI webservices.
